compliance.title: Compliance Certifications
compliance.kvkk.body: Full compliance with Turkish Personal Data Protection Law (6698). VERBIS-registered.
compliance.gdpr.body: EU General Data Protection Regulation compliance. EU residency available.
compliance.soc2.body: Independent audit completing Q3 2026. Interim controls report on request.
compliance.pci.body: Payment data handled in-scope as PCI DSS Level 4; we never store raw card data.
pentest.title: Penetration Test Reports
pentest.subtitle: Comprehensive tests by independent security firms.
twofa.title: Two-Factor Authentication (2FA)
twofa.subtitle: Add a second layer of protection to your account.
twofa.totp.scan: Scan this QR with your authenticator app.
twofa.webauthn.title: Register your device
twofa.webauthn.body: Fingerprint, face ID, or physical security key (YubiKey etc).
twofa.backup.title: Backup codes
twofa.backup.warning: Save these 10 codes in a safe place — your only way back if you lose your phone.
twofa.verify.title: Verify code
twofa.verify.subtitle: Enter the code from your method to finish setup.
twofa.success.title: ✓ 2FA enabled
twofa.success.body: Every future sign-in will ask for a code from your method.
sessions.title: Active Sessions
sessions.subtitle: Sessions on every device you've signed in from. Revoke any you don't recognise.
audit.title: Audit Log
audit.subtitle: Every action on your account.
audit.search: Search by action, resource or IP…
dsr.title: Export My Data (KVKK / GDPR)
dsr.subtitle: Per KVKK Art. 11 / GDPR Art. 15, request all your data as PDF.
dsr.law.tr: KVKK Statement: You have the right to know what personal data we hold, request a copy, correction, or deletion.
dsr.law.eu: GDPR Right of Access: We are legally bound to deliver all your data within 30 days.
dsr.history.title: Previous Requests
residency.title: Data Residency
residency.subtitle: You choose where your data lives (Enterprise tier).
residency.tr.desc: Istanbul DC. Required for KVKK — default for TR customers.
residency.uae.desc: Dubai DC. Low latency for MENA customers.
sensitive.note: Why we ask: This action will be logged in your audit log.
